main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'inadequate flushing of glycerin' matches glicerina anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 5 signals (glicerina 320, ORP -10, aclarados 1, cond 580, caudal 175)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (ramp-up daño, incompatibilidad quimica) cortas

recommended_action.justification: C4: 2 aclarados 1h low-P 10-15 bar - direccional pero presion alta para aclarado
